emails.subject: RE: WeatherDelta demonstration scheduling
emails.body: Alex, I agree. Let them make up the data. Please, ask Shirley to determine convenient date and time. Vince Alex Huang@ENRON 11/01/2000 03:59 PM

emails.subject: RE: WeatherDelta demonstration scheduling
emails.body: Hi all, The scheduled Wednesday (Nov. 8) presentation has to be cancelled. Even though in his earlier message Mike said Wednesday is ok, now they will have problem sending people. I will try to reschedule the presentation to a later date. Best, Alex Forwarded by Alex Huang/Corp/Enron on 11/07/2000 07:54 AM Denton Mike <Michael.Denton@caminus.com> on 11/06/2000 04:31:19 PM
